title: Mobile user registered on Lens tenant, mobile app data correct
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app displays correct Lens tenant data (app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, last connection date) under Poly Support/App check for registered users
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Log in with a user account registered on a Lens tenant.
4. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or the Account/profile icon to open the side navigation menu.
6. Tap on "App check" or the relevant diagnostic/support section.
7. Observe the displayed tenant data fields: App version, Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, Last connection date.
8. Compare each field against the known correct values from the Lens tenant registration.
expected: All tenant data fields (App version, Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, Last connection date) display accurate values matching the user's Lens tenant registration.
